description: You are a security researcher fixing a broken steganography tool (`stego_toolkit`) located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/stego_toolkit`. The tool uses the Least Significant Bit (LSB) technique but currently produces visually corrupted images, fails to decode messages correctly, and does not stop reading at the message end. Fix the encoding and binary-to-text decoding logic in `stego_toolkit/lsb.py`, ensuring the null terminator is handled correctly so that all tests in the `tests/` directory pass. Do not modify the test files or `utils.py`.
